title: 有馬記念の後に・最後のキーワード

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
AW YEEEAH! I have conquered the summit of Mt.
Fujiii!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It pains me to say, but it appears I am still one
step behind you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
For a moment, I thought I was going to catch up,
but there was no stopping you once your fire was
stoked... Well done.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Dang... I was so sure I was gonna win today!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You guys made for a formidable mountain range!
My passion for climbing got dialed to the max
thanks to you!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
We have fought many great battles before, and
today was no exception.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: And now, I shall impart you with this.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what this Eden you seek is, but I am
cheering for you.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
choice_data_list: Is that the last clue for Eden?!
Is that the last clue for Eden?!
